title: Eranthemum hildebrandtii
taxonomy: Eranthemum hildebrandtii is a species within the family Acanthaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the acanthus or thistle family. The genus Eranthemum is a group of flowering plants native to tropical regions of Africa and Asia. The classification of Eranthemum hildebrandtii places it within the order Lamiales, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. uses: Eranthemum hildebrandtii has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties. intro: Eranthemum hildebrandtii, commonly known as the Madagascar lantana, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae.
